rulings.Rulings: continued to april 18, 2017. no response to examiner notes filed as of 3/24/17. in order to avoid an appearance on 4/18/17, a file stamped hard copy of the response must be delivered to this Examiner in Room 202 no later than Thursday, April 13, 2017. in addition, a status hearing is being set for April 11, 2017 for filing the additional bond (see examiner notes). appearance required on that date unless the ex parte petition is filed and additional bond is on file no later than April 6, 2017. it is further noted that the petition misstates the current bond. the petition states bond is $150K, but bond is $145K ($11K plus $134K).
